title: ERC-20 Transfer History

title: Net Worth Calculator
body: Calculate total wallet net worth across all EVM and non-EVM chains instantly.

title: Portfolio History
body: 30-day historical portfolio value over time â€” asset-by-asset breakdown per day.

title: Portfolio Tracker
body: Monitor multi-chain portfolio value and asset composition in real time.

title: Transaction History
body: Paginated, decoded transaction history with logs for any wallet or contract address.

title: Wallet Activity Feed
body: Stream live wallet events and transaction activity across any supported chain.

title: Wallet Age & Summary
body: Get first and last transaction date, total transaction count, and gas spent for any wallet â€” the foundation for wallet age verification and on-chain identity.

title: Wallet Balances Skill
body: Fetch token balances and portfolio state for any wallet across 100+ chains.

title: Bitcoin Balance Checker
body: Fetch confirmed UTXOs, current balance, and USD value for any Bitcoin address.

title: Bitcoin HD Wallet Scanner
body: Enumerate all derived addresses and balances from a Bitcoin xpub/ypub/zpub HD wallet key.

title: Bitcoin Transaction Explorer
body: Paginated transaction history for any Bitcoin address — inputs, outputs, fees, and confirmation status.

title: Historical Token Holdings
body: Snapshot of every ERC-20 token balance and USD value at any past date — foundational chains only.

title: Wallet P&L Tracker
body: Unrealized P&L for every token in a wallet — shows entry price, current price, and total gain/loss per position.

title: Crypto Tax Exporter
body: Export a complete CSV of all ERC-20 transfers and transactions with USD cost basis for tax reporting — Koinly/CoinTracker compatible.

title: Multi-Wallet Portfolio Aggregator
body: Enter multiple wallet addresses and see combined token balances, total net worth, and unified transaction feed — your whole onchain life in one view.

title: Portfolio Performance Report
body: 30-day rolling P&L report with per-token open/high/low/close — build fund-grade performance dashboards for any wallet on foundational chains.
